arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss hands recall after four-and-a-half month absence and names two kids on the bench against Coventry
arts.sum: Ryley Towler is handed his first Pompey appearance since August for the visit of Coventry.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard has named his Coventry City team to face Portsmouth at Fratton Park
arts.sum: City: Brad Collins; Milan Van Ewijk, Bobby Thomas, Luis Binks, Jay Dasilva; Victor Torp, Ben Sheaf; Tatsuhiro Sakamoto, Jack Rudoni, Ephron Mason-Clark; Norman Bassette. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Coventry City: build-up, team news and live updates from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Good morning from Fratton Park for today’s clash with Coventry City.

arts.ttl: Championship pundit weighs up Coventry City play-off chances under Frank Lampard
arts.sum: Frank Lampard’s start to life at Coventry City has shown ‘positive signs’ and they can’t be ruled out of the play-off race despite needing a ‘remarkable effort,’ says Championship pundit Don Goodman. “There have definitely been positive signs from Frank Lampard’s start to life at Coventry City,” said Goodman, speaking to CoinPoker .

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Coventry City injury news as seven out
arts.sum: Pompey and the Sky Blues clash at Fratton Park in one of the lunch time matches in the Sky Bet Championship.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ verdict as Fifa cash boost confirmed ahead of transfer window
arts.sum: John Mousinho has confirmed Pompey will be compensated for Kusini Yengi’s injury picked up while on international duty.

arts.ttl: The boost for Portsmouth after Fulham signing’s injury nightmare - as boss clarifies £500,000 fee inaccuracies
arts.sum: Ibane Bowat has been backed to emerge from his injury darkness at full throttle next season.

arts.ttl: EFL make official decision for Portsmouth Championship clash vs Coventry City
arts.sum: Portsmouth will welcome Coventry City to Fratton Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard makes admission about Coventry City's plans for January transfer business
arts.sum: The head coach revealed he’s had conversations with Sky Blues owner Doug King and head of recruitment Dean Austin and has already started to identify areas on the pitch that might benefit from strengthening, albeit his main focus remains working with the players he has inherited. Frank Lampard has spoken about Coventry City’s plan for the January transfer window and the possibility of adding fresh players to help with the push during the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Coventry City: Jordan Cross’ predicted line-up with two significant changes
arts.sum: Pompey embark on a testing festive period tomorrow with Coventry City the visitors to Fratton Park.
